_comment: sparkinfer path-based emission weighting for SN74 / Gittensor. Sums to 1.0.

scoring.bench/**: code quality (AST) — measurement infra, not speed-scored

notes: Intra-repo split for the sparkinfer monorepo. Weights are maturity-adaptive: as the runtime nears the hardware ceiling and 10x wins vanish, improvement is scored vs remaining headroom (roofline %) and weights rebalance toward the smaller buckets. 'agent' is a separate repo. Full reward model: https://github.com/gittensor-ai-lab
